Performance Optimization : Identify and address performance bottlenecks in applications, ensuring optimal performance and responsiveness.
Must Have Skills (Core Competencies)
Strong proficiency in Python
Experience in RESTful API development (FastAPI / Flask / Django)
Solid understanding of data structures, algorithms, and OOP concepts
Experience with at least one ML framework (Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, or PyTorch)
Knowledge of API security (JWT, OAuth2)
Experience with databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, or MongoDB)

Good to Have
Experience with cloud platforms (AWS / Azure / GCP)
Knowledge of Docker / containerization
Experience with microservices architecture
Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines
Wellness programs
Exposure to LLMs / Generative AI (bonus for your current direction)
